English

Noun

  1. A greeting used in English borrowed from French.

French

Pronunciation

  • IPA: /bɔ̃.ʒuʁ/
  • IPA: /bɔ̃.ʒuʁ/

Interjection

  1. hello, good morning, good day
    Bonjour, comment allez-vous ? — Hello, how are you?
  2. goodbye (when leaving during the day)

Noun

  1. A greeting, a hello.
    • Dire bonjour — to say hello

Occitan

Interjection

  1. Should not appear in results.
